paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. was last reported at 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will be hosted on August 13, 2026. Other news headlines discuss the company's convertible notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have been bullish on the company despite the sharp selloff.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings related to the company's convertible senior notes offering. There has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
